If you look at the left side of the boat
in this picture you can see a small window, which is fixed and does not open
the rest of that area is open and there is no window for it but they do supply
a canvas cover to put on when the boat isn’t being used so the rain does not
get into the cockpit area.
 

  
 



Emad Hanna

Subject: Re: Pioneer cockpit
pictures
 




  
 





do the 

side windows close? the photos are inconclusive
